title: Brute Force
description: Hunt repeated or distributed authentication failures that may indicate password spraying or brute-force activity.
hypothesis_templates: An external or internal actor is attempting repeated authentication guesses against monitored identities.
Authentication failure bursts across identity providers and SIEM alerts indicate password spray activity.

parameters.name: tenant
parameters.description: Tenant, business unit, or environment selector.

parameters.name: lookback_hours
parameters.description: Hours of authentication telemetry to review.

parameters.name: source_ip
parameters.description: Optional IP address to prioritize in the hunt.

telemetry_requirements.description: Identity-provider failures with username, IP, geo, and conditional-access context.
Alert or event correlation for spray-style behavior across users or source networks.

blind_spots: Rate-limited or blocked attempts may be partially visible depending on the identity provider and logging tier.
Distributed password sprays across many source IPs may require wider aggregation than the default scope.

execution_targets.name: Okta failure burst review
execution_targets.description: Inspect repeated failed sign-ins and challenge failures in Okta System Log.

execution_targets.name: M365 failed sign-in sweep
execution_targets.description: Review repeated failed sign-ins and risk indicators in Microsoft identity telemetry.

execution_targets.name: Sentinel password spray correlation
execution_targets.description: Use KQL to find repeated authentication failures clustered by source or time.
execution_targets.query_template: SigninLogs | where TimeGenerated > ago({{lookback_hours}}h) | summarize failures=count() by IPAddress, UserPrincipalName

notes: Use this pack for password spray, brute-force, or repetitive authentication-failure leads.
